function.name: unlink
function.eval: [[ ref('fleet.fleet_vehicle_state_new_request', raise_if_not_found=False), ref('fleet.fleet_vehicle_state_to_order', raise_if_not_found=False), ref('fleet.fleet_vehicle_state_ordered', raise_if_not_found=False), ref('fleet.fleet_vehicle_state_reserve', raise_if_not_found=False), ref('fleet.fleet_vehicle_state_waiting_list', raise_if_not_found=False), ]]
